videos.title: Learn CSS Scroll Snap In 6 Minutes
videos.description: Quick and comprehensive tutorial covering all CSS scroll snap properties including scroll-snap-type, scroll-snap-align, and padding adjustments.

videos.title: 23 CSS features you should know (and be using) by now
videos.description: Covers scroll-snap, scroll-padding, and scroll-margin with practical demonstrations and use cases.

videos.title: More CSS quick tips
videos.description: Includes overscroll-behavior which complements scroll snap for controlling scroll boundaries in snapping containers.

videos.title: Learn CSS Grid the easy way
videos.description: Grid layout techniques that work alongside scroll snap for creating gallery and carousel components with snapping.
